title: Star Miner Reborn

body:
This mod is a high-version remake of Starminer for 1.7.10, which disables vanilla terrain generation. Players will enter a zero-gravity environment when leaving a planet's gravitational range, with planetary gravity only taking effect when approaching within 10 blocks of a planet. Additionally, each planet internally generates fluids.

This mod depends on[GravityChanger:v1.1.2](https://github.com/qouteall/GravityChanger/releases/tag/v1.1.2-mc1.20.1)
